Harbor Fictional Bank presents the Harbor Rewards Plus Card for personal applicants.
Earn 60,000 Harbor Rewards points after $4,000 in purchases within 3 months of account opening.
Annual fee is $95 and is not waived the first year.
The visible card network is Mastercard.
Applications must be received by October 15, 2026.
Points are expected to appear within 2 billing cycles after the minimum spend is completed.
